name: ColorSwatch
searchText: colorswatch displays color @mantine/core /core/color-swatch children color radius size withshadow

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem.

props.name: size
props.description: Swatch width and height, any valid CSS value, numbers are converted to rem.

props.name: withShadow
props.description: If set, the swatch has inner box-shadow
